title: Pharmaceutical Calculations for Caribbean Pharmacy Technicians
description: This course teaches Caribbean pharmacy technicians essential pharmaceutical calculations skills needed to serve patients across diverse CARICOM nations like Trinidad & Tobago, Jamaica, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize, where they often provide frontline chronic disease management.
what_youll_learn: Perform accurate dosage calculations for solid, liquid, and parenteral medications
Adjust drug concentrations and volumes for tropical storage conditions
Manage medication supply chain challenges like inter-island shipping delays
Identify herbal medicine interactions with common Caribbean chronic disease treatments
Apply relevant national drug schedules and formularies across the CARICOM region
